category_sources: Official Chez Scheme site describes it as a programming language and implementation with compiler, runtime system, and programming environment.
source_facts.description says Chez Scheme is an implementation of the Chez Scheme language.
display_name_sources: Official Chez Scheme site uses the display name Chez Scheme.
docs_sources: Official Chez Scheme site links to the User's Guide as the best starting point for documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Chez Scheme site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/cisco/ChezScheme, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Chez Scheme site describes a compiler, run-time system, programming environment, and Scheme language support.
